svg.title: Settings Persistence and Configuration Flow
svg.desc: Animated diagram showing the bidirectional flow between the React SettingsPanel UI, the useSettings hook, tauri-plugin-store JSON persistence, side effects triggered on save, and the startup initialisation path.

g.text: Wayland shortcut changes require app restart
X11: hot-reload via update_shortcut IPC | Wayland: no global shortcut re-register API
Settings persisted to ~/.config/emoji-nook/settings.json via tauri-plugin-store with autoSave enabled
